use_cases: Toggle between light and dark themes using an intuitive vertical drag gesture
Replace traditional click-based theme toggles with gesture-based interaction
Add interactive theme switching to any web application dashboard or landing page
Enhance user experience with physics-based drag animations for theme transitions
Provide a visually appealing sun/moon orb control for theme selection
ai_summary: A drag-based theme switcher component that toggles dark/light mode through a vertical pull gesture. Features a radial gradient sun/moon orb with glow shadow effects and smooth physics-based animations using Framer Motion. The component uses CSS class toggling on the document root to switch themes, with bounce physics and drag elasticity for satisfying interaction feel.
